category_sources: source_facts.description begins 'Download videos'; official homepage https://svtplay-dl.se/ says svtplay-dl downloads videos from play services and is an open source command-line program.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is svtplay-dl; official homepage https://svtplay-dl.se/ and official repository https://github.com/spaam/svtplay-dl use svtplay-dl.
docs_sources: Official site navigation includes Usage, Options, and Config documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage https://svtplay-dl.se/ links Bugs and Issues and license to GitHub, and the official repository README at https://github.com/spaam/svtplay-dl names the project.
tags_sources: official homepage https://svtplay-dl.se/ describes an open source Python command-line program for downloading videos; source_facts.executables lists svtplay-dl.
